name: mobile
description: Mobile responsive improvements to existing renderers. Same component + same props + responsive implementation (shadcn approach): Tailwind breakpoints + minimal runtime branches (small-screen Select/Tree-select -> bottom-sheet, Dialog -> fullscreen, Table -> card stack, Tabs -> horizontal scroll/swipe). NO mobileUI flag, NO new *-mobile components. Driven by mobile-roadmap.md. M0 (responsive baseline) is hard prerequisite for M1-M4. Does NOT overlap improvement roadmap (desktop features/naming) or main roadmap (new components).
